creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Wed Mar  6 03:04:32 2013
New Revision: 313496
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313496

Log:
  - Update to 1.9.8.13056
  
  PR:		ports/176652
  Submitted by:	Rusty Nejdl <rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/assp/Makefile
  head/mail/assp/distinfo

Modified: head/mail/assp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/assp/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 01:24:25 2013	(r313495)
+++ head/mail/assp/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 03:04:32 2013	(r313496)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	assp
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.4.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.9.8.13056
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.ringofsaturn.com/distfiles/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME:U}_${PORTVERSION}-Install
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME:U}_${PORTVERSION}_Install
 
 MAINTAINER=	rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
 COMMENT=	Anti-Spam SMTP Proxy
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ IPV6_DESC=	IPv6 sockets support
 
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	EMVALID SPF SRS SEND FBACKW ZLIB CLAMAV DNSBL MATCHRE SENDERB MIMEMOD SSL IPV6
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/${DISTNAME}/${PORTNAME:U}
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/ASSP_1.98_13056_install/${PORTNAME:U}
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 

Modified: head/mail/assp/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/assp/distinfo	Wed Mar  6 01:24:25 2013	(r313495)
+++ head/mail/assp/distinfo	Wed Mar  6 03:04:32 2013	(r313496)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (ASSP_1.9.8.13056_Install.zip) = 81f7e657914d383bf24cacef72a1164c3da397353216fd5b2280c907b450d692
+SIZE (ASSP_1.9.8.13056_Install.zip) = 874209
